defs: The act of reprobating; the state of being reprobated; strong disapproval or censure.
quotes: The profligate pretenses upon which he was perpetually soliciting an increase of his disgraceful stipend are mentioned with becoming reprobation.
Set a brand of reprobation on clipped poetry and false coin.

defs: The predestination of a certain number of the human race as reprobates, or objects of condemnation and punishment.
